mapper.select: SELECT n.notice_id, n.writer_id, u.nickname AS writer_nickname, n.title, n.content, n.published_at, n.status, n.created_at, n.updated_at FROM notices n LEFT JOIN users u ON n.writer_id = u.user_id WHERE n.notice_id = #{id}

SELECT n.notice_id, n.writer_id, u.nickname AS writer_nickname, n.title, n.content, n.status, n.published_at, n.created_at, n.updated_at FROM notices n LEFT JOIN users u ON n.writer_id = u.user_id
ORDER BY n.notice_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

where.if: AND COALESCE(n.published_at, n.created_at) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND COALESCE(n.published_at, n.created_at) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notices ( writer_id, title, content, status, published_at ) VALUES ( #{writerId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PUBLISHED' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END )
mapper.update: UPDATE notices SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, published_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PUBLISHED' AND published_at IS NULL THEN NOW() WHEN #{status} = 'DRAFT' THEN NULL ELSE published_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
